sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50588" key="i)oqalh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰο-θᾱλής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n50588.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blooming with violets</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στέφανοι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.42</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
